title: A Box Full of Gratitude 🎁
message: Every gift eventually gets old, but your love and care for me never will. Thank you for being my biggest support through every phase of my life.

title: The Infinite Heart ❤️
message: This heart represents something that has no end—my love and respect for you as my sister. No distance, no argument, and no time can ever change that.

title: My Childhood Teddy 🧸
message: Whenever I think about childhood, I don't just remember toys—I remember you. Every silly fight, every laugh, every memory made those years unforgettable.

title: Bloom Like a Flower 🌸
message: No matter where life takes you, I hope you continue spreading kindness, happiness and positivity just like a flower spreads its fragrance.

title: Butterfly Dreams 🦋
message: May every dream you've ever had spread its wings and become reality. Never stop believing in yourself.

title: My Lucky Star ⭐
message: If I ever feel lucky in life, it's because I was blessed with a sister like you. Thank you for making my world brighter.

title: Sweet Like Chocolate 🍫
message: Life isn't always sweet, but your smile somehow makes difficult days feel a little lighter. Never stop smiling.

title: A Balloon Full of Wishes 🎈
message: Imagine this balloon carrying every wish I've ever made for you—happiness, success, health, peace, and countless beautiful memories.

title: The Ribbon of Our Bond 🎀
message: Some bonds don't need to be tied together—they already are. Ours is one of them, and I hope it remains just as beautiful forever.

title: One Last Picture 📸
message: Photos freeze moments, but they can never capture how much those moments truly mean. Thank you for filling my life with memories worth remembering forever.
